product.title: Neutrogena Healthy Skin Liquid Foundation Makeup with Broad Spectrum SPF 20 Sunscreen, Lightweight, Medium Coverage Makeup with Sunscreen and Pro-Vitamin B5, Natural Ivory 20, 1 fl. oz
featureBullets: Neutrogena Healthy Skin Liquid Makeup Foundation with SPF 20 in 1 Fl. Oz. delivers natural-looking, even coverage while helping protect against sun damage and nourishing skin with Pro-vitamin B5 and antioxidants
This lightweight makeup foundation provides medium coverage and features Pro-Vitamin B5 and antioxidants to support healthy-looking skin, making it suitable for normal to dry skin types
Made with broad spectrum SPF 20 sunscreen with titanium dioxide and UVA/UVB protection to help prevent sunburn and signs of early aging when used as directed with other sun protections measures
Formulated with a blend of antioxidants, including Pro-Vitamin B5, to help nourish skin & keep skin looking radiant while providing medium makeup coverage
Neutrogena’s face foundation blends skin-enhancing makeup with daily sunscreen protection for smooth, healthy-looking skin—perfect for your everyday beauty routine
product.description: Product Description Neutrogena Healthy Skin Liquid Makeup Foundation with Broad Spectrum SPF 20 Sunscreen and Pro-Vitamin B5 provides skin-enhancing coverage with sun protection in every application. This lightweight, nourishing liquid foundation makeup helps visibly even skin tone while defending against harmful UVA/UVB rays with titanium dioxide sunscreen. The Healthy Skin Liquid foundation formula contains a blend of antioxidants which help protect skin from environmental stressors and Pro-Vitamin B5 to nourish skin. Its non-greasy formula supports a healthy-looking and youthful glow that visibly evens skin tone while combining the nourishing benefits of Pro-Vitamin B5. This lightweight, medium coverage foundation makeup blends seamlessly, leaving skin looking naturally radiant. Use this foundation with sunscreen as a part of your daily beauty routine to create any desired look while helping to protect your skin from the sun. Brand Story By Neutrogena Cosmetics

specification.value: Benefits: Our silky, lightweight formula provides flawless makeup coverage for a perfectly natural look. The Broad Spectrum SPF 20 formula, with an exclusive antioxidant blend, works to visibly improve luminosity, tone and texture for healthier looking skin.
#3,166 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #38 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be of good quality, with smooth application and even coverage that evens out skin tone. The product works well for sensitive skin and doesn't clog pores or enhance wrinkles, while leaving a nice even finish. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin tone well, others find it darker than expected. The foundation's longevity is also mixed, with some saying it lasts all day while others report losing product.

reviews.reviewText: “I’ve been using the Neutrogena Healthy Skin Liquid Makeup for a while now, and I’m really impressed. The formula is lightweight, non-greasy, and glides on so smoothly for a flawless, natural finish. It evens out my skin tone beautifully and gives my skin a healthy glow without feeling heavy. I also love that it has broad-spectrum SPF 20 for daily sun protection. With ingredients like vitamin E, feverfew, and soy, my skin actually looks better even after I take it off. It feels more like skincare than makeup, and it’s perfect for everyday wear.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Have worn this for years. Very light but great coverage. Approve!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: The perfect combination of skincare and makeup in one.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I like the feel of this on my skin. Just the right shade for me and not chalky.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: One of the best foundations I’ve used, even when compared to upscale brands!
reviews.reviewText: I previously used Neutrogena’s Hydro Boost hydrating tint in the shade nude 40 and it instantly became my favorite light coverage foundation. When I recently ran out, I couldn’t go to the store to buy another one so I decided to look for it on Amazon. I came across this foundation and decided to buy this one instead as it was cheaper and has SPF 20, unlike the hydrating tint. It arrived sooner than expected and in perfect condition. I used it the same day for work, and instantly it became my new favorite foundation! I like it even better than upscale brands I’ve used previously such as Estée Lauder, Clinique, Laura Mercier and so on. This foundation does it all, flawless coverage without any ‘heavy’ feeling or even feeling like you’re wearing foundation, lasts all day without needing to be retouched, doesn’t rub off or stain my clothes if I wear sweatshirts, my mask for work or such, and best of all doesn’t break out my sensitive skin! I have sensitive as well as oily skin, so many foundations tend to be a bad fit for me and especially with cheaper makeup. It works perfectly and I will most certainly continue buying this product as it is now my go to foundation. My only sole complaint would be the shade is a little different from the Hydro Boost tint, but I’m assuming it’s due to it being a tint/lighter rather than a higher coverage foundation. It still fits my skin color, it’s just a wee bit darker and all I have to do is blend it in more and use less which I don’t mind at all! Overall, one of the best foundations I’ve ever used and highly recommend trying/purchasing this! For the price and quality, it is very hard to beat this deal.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 23, 2020

reviews.reviewText: My favorite non-expensive makeup. What more can I say except it goes on easy and there are enough shades for everyone, and every season. The texture is perfect, not too thick and not too thin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 3, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Not for fair or light skin tones
reviews.reviewText: I really want to like this foundation because it goes on really well it looks very natural and it doesn't clog my sensitive skin or cause any bad reactions. However it is not usable for anybody with pale or even just light skin. Even the lightest formulation number 10 is too dark and definitely has a yellow undertone which does not work for me. If I go up to 20 it has the pink undertone that I need but it is even darker and will oxidize a little bit orange so it's like I'm trying to apply fake tan. For reference I am quite pale but I have rosacea so I'm not even trying to match my actual skin tone I'm just trying to tone down the red and it is still too dark. Neutrogena is generally light skin friendly so I'm guessing there's something with the sunscreen that is skewing the color. If you have pale skin just skip this product and try something else.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 3, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Finally after many tries this one works great quality great match, this will be a repurchase for sure.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I'm really happy with this foundation (Ivory 20). I was a bit skeptical when I opened the box, as the colour looked a bit too dark for me but it's actually a perfect match. It's very lightweight coverage and doesn't look or feel cakey on my skin. I do wish the bottle had a pump, but other than that it's great. Will definitely be ordering more.

reviews.reviewTitle: The skin color also covers my scars, which also look so natural
reviews.reviewText: It's amazing, I've used it for the last 5 years!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 19, 2026

reviews.reviewText: The very best foundation I have ever had!! shall be buying more!! would recommend over and over soooooo smooth. I used buff and it is great on my fair skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on April 27, 2021
